scope: Exact upstream source archives for the retained Magisk v30.7 magiskboot and BusyBox executables: both program roots, all seven Magisk Gitlinks, every one of the 140 checksum-locked Cargo registry packages, and the exact quick-protobuf Git source used by two locked Cargo packages. This is complete source conveyance for those program inputs, not proof of a byte-for-byte rebuild and not an archive of external compiler or Android SDK toolchains.
